audit_schedule.weekly_knowledge_audit: Every week: latest decisions / docs / evidence
audit_schedule.monthly_architecture_review: Every month: Architecture Discussion / merge / archive
audit_schedule.quarterly_security_infrastructure_review: Every quarter: Security / Vercel / Supabase / Cloudflare / Domain / Secrets
audit_schedule.ai_model_capability_review: Quarterly or major release: OpenAI / Anthropic / Codex / Cursor / NotebookLM / Vision

items.title: Security Foundation Sprint
items.summary: Evolution Factory must secure Identity, Recovery, Secrets, and Risk before deeper production work.
items.action: Complete Google Account Recovery and confirm Password Manager storage.

items.title: Human Navigator for Vercel 2FA
items.summary: Docs alone are not enough; Human needs current screen, required app, exact next action, failure path, and completion check.
items.action: Reuse this format for GitHub, Supabase, Cloudflare, OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google setup screens.

items.title: Vercel + Supabase Production Path
items.summary: GitHub Pages remains temporary preview only; Vercel + Supabase is the recommended app/API/DB/Auth path.
items.action: After Security Foundation, import repo to Vercel and create Supabase project.
